name: Hearsay
description:
Hearsay is the ideal platform for businesses in the financial services sector, offering solutions for compliant communication and social media management. Users love it for the ease with which they can navigate the complex regulatory landscape of financial communications, which are notoriously tough. Hearsay combines regulatory adhesion with effective tools for client engagement and content distribution.

Here’s why you’ll love it:

  • A flexible pricing structure charges based on services and scale
  • Compliant communication is easy. The platform ensures adherence to industry regulations in all of your client communications, so legal doesn’t have to breathe down your neck.
  • Enjoy tailored tools for financial services content management, included targeted content distribution, so you hit the mark every time
  • Client engagement analytics make it easy to track and analyze client interactions, so you can improve your customer service (and client relations)
  • Supported platforms include major social media and digital communication platforms

Key Features:

✅  Regulatory compliance

✅  Financial services content management

✅  Engagement tracking
what_people_say:
What people say :

If you’re in the financial services sector, Hearsay could be your match made in heaven. Best suited for large firms, it’s perfect for managing compliance while still hitting your social media goals.

Here’s what people have to say about it:

“Hearsay has been critical for our compliant communication needs, though it’s tailored more towards larger firms.”

“It’s a niche product that perfectly suits our industry. I recommend Hearsay to any financial services company.”
cta_heading: Synup Social excels with superior features and competitive price
what_it_s_lacking:
What it’s lacking:

  • 🚫 Integration with a broader range of marketing tools
  • 🚫 Advanced analytics
  • 🚫 More accessible pricing
  • 🚫 Simpler interface
